prompt:
ERA Bahrain - Exhibition Stand Design Brief
Client: ERA Bahrain
Event: Eskan Bank Innovation Summit 28 April
Location: Bahrain
Stand Size: 6m � 6m (36 sqm)
Stand Type: Island / Semi-open

Stand open from 3 sides and the 4th side should be partially open with a semi-open wall.
Design direction should feel like a premium real estate gallery.
Use gold and white as the main colors with ERA Bahrain logo branding.
Include 2 vertical 65 inch touch screens in the center with ERA logo signage above them.
Include 1 additional touch screen at the entrance for project browsing.
Add a main entrance reception counter with hidden storage and a coffee snacks section.
Show 3 project model displays with the main project model in the center highlighted by an overhead spotlight, plus two side display tables.
Use parquet flooring and include a small accessibility ramp.
Create 6 to 8 discussion points with small tables and maximum 3 chairs each.
Add a dedicated VIP area with sofa seating provided by client, coffee table, and coffee machine table for investor discussions.
Generate two professional concept directions with accurate architectural zoning and commercial booth realism.
Keep the concepts premium, buildable, and appropriate for a real-estate client presentation.
refinement_prompt: Open the stand more and increase the premium gold branding while keeping the zoning clear.

concepts.title: Concept 1
concepts.summary: Premium gallery-led direction with clear zoning and high client readability.
concepts.refinement_prompt: Open the stand more and increase the premium gold branding while keeping the zoning clear.
concepts.prompt:
Client: ERA Bahrain
Event: Eskan Bank Innovation Summit 28 April
Location: Bahrain
Stand size: 6m x 6m (36 sqm)
Stand type: Island / Semi-open
Open sides / access: Open from 3 sides
Semi-open wall details: 4th side partially open with a semi-open wall
Brand name: ERA Bahrain
Brand colors: Gold, White
Branding elements: ERA Bahrain logo
Screen requirements: 2 vertical 65 inch touch screens in the center with ERA signage above, plus 1 touch screen at the entrance
Reception requirements: Reception counter at main entrance with hidden storage and coffee snacks section
Project model display: 3 project models, with main model in the center highlighted by an overhead spotlight and 2 models on side display tables
Flooring: Parquet flooring
Accessibility: Small accessibility ramp for people with disabilities
Discussion / meeting areas: 6 to 8 discussion points, each with a small table and maximum 3 chairs
VIP area: Dedicated VIP seating zone with sofa seating, coffee table, and coffee machine table
Material direction: Premium real estate / modern property gallery, polished and commercially realistic
Avoid: No dark mood, no double deck, no retail shelves
Extra notes: Prioritize clear zoning and circulation

Keep the concepts premium, buildable, and appropriate for a real-estate client presentation.
